description: You are an investment banking analyst cleaning up an OCR-extracted document at ~/Documents/project_pegasus_raw.docx. Clean the text by removing artificial hard line breaks in the three main body paragraphs while preserving paragraph breaks. Format these paragraphs with Justified alignment and a 0.5-inch First Line Indent. Apply 'Heading 1' style to 'PROSPECTUS SUMMARY' and 'Heading 2' style to 'The Company', 'Risk Factors', and 'Selected Financial Data'. Reconstruct the space-aligned financial data under 'Selected Financial Data' into a 4-column table with right-aligned financial data columns. Add a right-aligned document header reading 'Project Pegasus - Investment Memorandum' and a diagonal 'CONFIDENTIAL' text watermark. Save the final document to ~/Documents/project_pegasus_final.docx.
